description_long: This object consists of two thick, hardbound books stacked and tightly secured together by a wide, textured brown strap. The covers are dark, with a slightly worn, leathery appearance, and each corner is reinforced with metallic gold protectors. The top book features a prominent red rectangular patch with a black circular emblem and some text, giving it a distinctive, themed look. The pages are visibly white and slightly uneven, suggesting a well-used or vintage style. The overall design is robust and decorative, making it stand out as a collectible or themed item.
description: A pair of thick, dark hardbound books stacked and bound by a brown strap, with gold corner protectors and a red emblem on the top cover.
description_view_0: Front view showing the stacked books' white page edges, the brown strap across the middle, and the red emblem on the top cover.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the brown strap, the gold spine bands, and the textured dark covers.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the gold corner protectors, the white page edges, and the brown strap running vertically.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the gold corner protectors, the brown strap, and the dark cover texture.
attribute_cover_illustration: The front cover features a bold, circular black emblem set within a red rectangular patch, with a stylized silhouette of a dinosaur. The rest of the cover is dark and textured, with no additional artwork or imagery.
attribute_spine_design: The spine is dark with two gold horizontal bands near the top and bottom, and no visible text or decorative patterns. The design is simple and functional.
